s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT CABLE FROM NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL
REMOVE FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY RH

atten4.ptxt: Use the same procedure for the RH side and the LH side.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE NO. 2 INSTRUMENT PANEL UNDER COVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 guides and remove the No. 2 under cover sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 3 claws and the 3 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the lower instrument panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt:
Remove the screw or

and the 3 screws .
Disengage the 3 claws and the 3 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the lower instrument panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE TIRE PRESSURE WARNING RESET SWITCH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 claws and remove the tire pressure warning reset switch from the lower instrument panel sub-assembly.
